Class ExpressionBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.AbstractParseTreeVisitor<Object>
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeYParserBaseVisitor<Object>
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.builder.DefaultBuilder
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.builder.ExpressionBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeYParserVisitor<Object>, ParseTreeVisitor<Object>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ContractsAndInvariantsFinder, ProblemFinder, TacletPBuilder
public class ExpressionBuilder extends DefaultBuilder
This visitor creates expression from KeyAst.Term. You should use the facade KeyIO.parseExpression(String) for term parsing.

    • visitParallel_term

      public JTerm visitParallel_term(KeYParser.Parallel_termContext ctx)
      Description copied from class: KeYParserBaseVisitor
      Visit a parse tree produced by KeYParser.parallel_term().

      The default implementation returns the result of calling AbstractParseTreeVisitor.visitChildren(RuleNode) on ctx.

      Specified by:
      visitParallel_term in interface KeYParserVisitor<Object>
      Overrides:
      visitParallel_term in class KeYParserBaseVisitor<Object>
      Parameters:
      ctx - the parse tree
      Returns:
      the visitor result

      public Object visitComparison_term(KeYParser.Comparison_termContext ctx)
